channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Information Security - New Feature - Abnormal AI Daily Email Digest
item.description: Effective July 15th, 2026, our Information Security team has enabled Abnormal Email Digest for our RPI Community. This digest will send a daily summary report of actions our email protection system took to remediate malicious emails before reaching RPI mailboxes. Please click this link to view additional information including our FAQ Article in ITSSC.
item.author: Community

item.title: Volunteer for New Student Orientation and NRB!
item.description: FYE is looking for enthusiastic volunteers to help welcome our new students and their families to campus. This is a great way to connect with colleagues, spread some school spirit, and be part of an unforgettable kickoff to the year. Sign up to volunteer here: https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0445A8A92FA6F5C34-64354400-fall Questions? Email fye@rpi.edu.
item.author: Community

item.title: Engineering the Quantum Future of Precision Medicine and Life Sciences
item.description: A Summer Retreat and Fireside Chat @ RPI, organized in collaboration with the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai, New York Genome Center and the JAX-NYSCF Collaborative Funding for sessions on Quantum Computing in Life Sciences and Medicine, held in collaboration with The Future of Computing Institute, was made possible by a grant from Justine, Russell Sage College ’81, and Jim Mullen ’80 Dates: July 27th (10:30 AM to 5:00 PM); July 28th (8:30 AM to 3:15 PM) Location: Experimental Media…
item.author: Community

item.title: Need a Professional Headshot? MMS can help!
item.description:
Multimedia Services provides free professional headshots to faculty and staff; this service is provided once a month. The next date is Wednesday July 22, 2026! Please use the Photography Request Form to book your appointment now! https://dotcio.rpi.edu/services/audio-video-and-photography/photography-and-portraits

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
